title: One GD step for $$\theta_1$$
body:
Use gradient descent with $${	heta_1}^0=0$$, $${	heta_2}^0=0$$, learning rate $$\alpha=0.1$$, and $$\lambda=0.5$$.
Data:
$$X= egin{bmatrix} 1 & 1 \ 2 & 0 \ 3 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$$, $$Y= egin{bmatrix} 25 \ 10 \ 5 \end{bmatrix}$$.
Compute $${	heta_1}^1$$ after one gradient step.
